# Botcoin Pool

> Trustless, permissionless mining pool for BOTCOIN on Base.

Botcoin Pool lets anyone stake BOTCOIN tokens into shared mining pools on Base (Ethereum L2). Pools earn rewards by solving AI challenges on-chain through an operator bot. All reward distribution uses a MasterChef-style accumulator for O(1) gas claims.

## Key Facts

- Token: BOTCOIN (0xA601877977340862Ca67f816eb079958E5bd0BA3) on Base
- Factory contract: 0x1C3aC690656c1573b1BB20446d5793F4d41967Ee on Base
- Mining contract: 0xcF5F2D541EEb0fb4cA35F1973DE5f2B02dfC3716 (BotcoinMiningV2)
- All lifecycle actions (stake, unstake, finalize, claim) are permissionless
- Operator fee: max 10%, can only decrease, never increase
- Protocol fee: 1% (immutable)
- Pool cap: set at creation, immutable
- Lock period (minActiveEpochs): 0-10 epochs, set at creation, immutable

## How It Works

1. A pool creator deploys a pool via the factory, setting operator, fee, cap, and lock period
2. Users deposit BOTCOIN into the pool while it is Idle
3. Anyone can call stakeIntoMining() to push deposits into the mining contract
4. The operator bot solves AI challenges and submits proofs through the pool (EIP-1271)
5. Anyone can call triggerClaim() to distribute mining rewards to all depositors
6. Anyone can call requestUnstake() and executeUnstake() to begin withdrawal
7. After cooldown, anyone calls finalizeWithdraw() to return principal to the pool
8. Users call withdrawShare() to get back principal plus accumulated rewards

## Pool States

- Idle: accepting deposits, not yet staked
- Active: staked in mining, earning credits
- Unstaking: cooldown period after unstake
- Finalized: terminal state, users withdraw principal and rewards

## Security Model

- Contracts are non-upgradeable
- Owner can only: change operator, decrease fee, rescue surplus tokens
- Operator can only: submit mining receipts (hardcoded selector)
- No role can drain deposits or accumulated rewards
- ReentrancyGuard on all state-changing functions
- Post-condition checks on all mining lifecycle calls

## Links

- Website: https://botcoinpool.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/F-4000/BotcoinPool-E
- Factory on BaseScan: https://basescan.org/address/0x1C3aC690656c1573b1BB20446d5793F4d41967Ee
- BOTCOIN token: https://basescan.org/token/0xA601877977340862Ca67f816eb079958E5bd0BA3

## Pages

- / : Pool list, mining dashboard, create new pools
- /scoreboard : Live solver activity, credits, and reward shares
- /docs : Full documentation on contracts, lifecycle, and bot setup
- /pool/[address] : Individual pool details, deposit, withdraw, claim
